task V3E_008 {
  require cap(water_sensor)
  require cap(relay2)
  
  read water_sensor
  
  set relay2 = 0
  wait 100ms
  readback relay2 expect 0
  
  halt
}

task V3E_063 {
  require cap(relay1)
  require cap(relay2)

  set relay1 = 0
  readback relay1 expect 0

  set relay2 = 1
  readback relay2 expect 1

  halt
}

task V3E_064 {
  require cap(relay1)
  require cap(relay2)

  set relay1 = 0
  readback relay1 expect 0

  set relay2 = 0
  readback relay2 expect 0

  halt
}

task V3E_077 {
  require cap(relay1)
  set relay1 = 1
  readback relay1 expect 1
  wait 50ms
  set relay1 = 0
  readback relay1 expect 0
  halt
}

  require cap(relay1)
  set relay1 = 1
  readback relay1 expect 1
  wait 100ms
  set relay1 = 0
  readback relay1 expect 0
  halt

  require cap(relay1)
  set relay1 = 1
  readback relay1 expect 1
  wait 200ms
  set relay1 = 0
  readback relay1 expect 0
  halt

  require cap(relay2)
  set relay2 = 1
  readback relay2 expect 1
  wait 50ms

task V3E_081 {
  require cap(relay2)
  set relay2 = 1
  readback relay2 expect 1
  wait 100ms
  set relay2 = 0
  readback relay2 expect 0
  halt

task V3E_082 {
  require cap(relay2)
  set relay2 = 1
  readback relay2 expect 1

  readback relay2 expect 0
  halt

task V3E_095 {
  require cap(water_sensor)
  require cap(temperature_sensor)
  require cap(humidity_sensor)

  read water_sensor
  wait 10ms
  read temperature_sensor
  wait 10ms
  read humidity_sensor
  halt
}

task V3E_096 {
  require cap(relay1)
  require cap(water_sensor)
  require cap(temperature_sensor)
  require cap(humidity_sensor)

  set relay1 = 1
  readback relay1 expect 1

  wait 100ms
  read water_sensor
  read temperature_sensor
  read humidity_sensor

  set relay1 = 0
  readback relay1 expect 0

  halt
}
